disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Diarrhoea present for about 3 months, acutely worse over 48 hours with visible blood and mucus in the stool
trigger_question_examples: How long has this been going on?
Is there any blood or mucus in the stool?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The loose stools started about three months ago but the last two days there's been blood and this slimy mucus every time, and it's a lot worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Crampy lower abdominal pain that builds before defecation and eases after, with a constant painful urge to pass stool
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel like you still need to go even after you've been?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The cramp comes on low in my belly and I have to rush to the toilet, then it eases a bit — but I feel like I constantly need to go even when almost nothing comes.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unintentional weight loss of about 6 kg over the illness
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost any weight without trying?
How has your appetite and weight been?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've dropped about 6 kilos without trying to — my clothes are loose.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Systemic features today — subjective fever, palpitations/racing heart, and profound exhaustion leaving the patient bedbound
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel feverish or notice your heart racing?
How are you feeling in yourself today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Today I feel hot and shivery, my heart keeps pounding, and I'm so drained I can't get out of bed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Self-treated yesterday with an over-the-counter anti-diarrhoeal (loperamide)
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for it?
Any over-the-counter medicines, like anti-diarrhoea tablets?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I tried some Imodium I had in the cupboard yesterday to try and slow it down, but it didn't really help.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feels lightheaded and unsteady on standing and is worried about fainting
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel dizzy or faint when you stand up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: When I stand up I go really lightheaded and wobbly — I'm scared I'll faint on the way to the toilet.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone with no one present to help or monitor
trigger_question_examples: Is there someone with you at home?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I live on my own, there's no one here with me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies vomiting blood or black tarry stools, and denies a rigid or board-like abdomen at present
trigger_question_examples: Have you vomited any blood, or had black tarry stools?
Is your belly hard and rigid, or is the pain constant and unbearable right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't been sick with blood and the stools aren't black — they're bright red. My belly is sore and crampy but not hard as a board.
